tagline: Weather for your exact next hour.

designSystem.style: Dark-first hyper-local weather UI with cyan primary accent, deep navy surfaces, vibrant status color coding (cyan/purple/amber/red/green), card-based layout with glowing micro-indicators, gradient hero cards, and 15-minute timeline scrollers. Emphasizes data density without cognitive overload through layered information hierarchy.

screens: Now — Real-time block-level micro-forecast with 15-min timeline, nearby blocks comparison, and live reports banner
Routes — Side-by-side route comparison with comfort scores, per-segment conditions, and smart navigation CTA
Events — Calendar-synced smart timing suggestions with departure optimization and gear recommendations
Reports — Community crowd-sourced live reports with quick-submit check-ins, photo support, and confirmation voting
Settings — Profile personalization (commuter/runner/parent/delivery), theme toggle, notification controls, calendar sync
